calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Petitioner: Joy Tian, present in pro per, and also as petitioner in behalf of son a minor Zhengchao Sun who also petitioned the court to have his name changed was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Mother to :Joy Hom
and the minor's name be changed to Carl Hom.
Decree signed in open court.
